name: Waterland Su Arıtma ve Çevre Teknolojileri
description: WATERLAND is a specialized manufacturer of industrial and municipal water treatment solutions, emphasizing advanced technologies for treating and purifying water in high-risk environments. Their extensive offerings include various systems for reverse osmosis, wastewater treatment, and water reclamation, ensuring compliance with local regulations.

name: Watercare Mining & Innovations
description: Watercare Innovations specializes in developing tailored water treatment solutions for mining and industrial operations, focusing on enhancing plant performance through effective water utilization and recovery. With over 40 years of experience, the company offers a wide range of technologies, including solid-liquid separation and filtration, to ensure that water streams are optimized for various industrial applications.

name: Aquatech
description: Aquatech specializes in advanced industrial water treatment solutions, focusing on technologies such as wastewater treatment, recycling, and zero liquid discharge (ZLD) to address water scarcity. Their innovative approaches, including High Efficiency Reverse Osmosis (HERO) and modular biological systems, enable efficient treatment and reuse of various waste streams.

name: Evoqua Water Technologies
description: Evoqua Water Technologies specializes in industrial water treatment, offering a wide range of advanced systems and services that ensure water quality, compliance, and reuse. With over a century of expertise, the company serves various industrial sectors, providing tailored solutions and proactive maintenance to enhance operational efficiency.

name: ChemTreat
description: ChemTreat is a prominent provider of industrial water treatment solutions, offering tailored programs for various sectors such as food and beverage, healthcare, and power generation. Their services include raw water treatment, wastewater management, and advanced technologies to address critical water treatment challenges, ultimately enhancing operational efficiency and supporting environmental goals.

name: Mobile Water Services
description: NSI Mobile Water Solutions specializes in temporary water treatment, offering a wide range of technologies such as reverse osmosis, ultrafiltration, and seawater desalination. Their mobile systems are designed for rapid deployment, making them ideal for emergency situations and long-term projects that require a reliable water supply.

name: Veolia Water Technologies Asia Pacific
description: Veolia Water Technologies specializes in industrial wastewater treatment, offering a wide range of technologies and solutions tailored to meet the specific purification challenges faced by various industries. Their services not only ensure compliance with regional standards but also enable the reuse of water, thereby reducing overall waste and operational costs.

name: Phoenix Water Technologies Ltd
description: Phoenix Water Technologies Ltd specializes in industrial water treatment solutions, offering a range of products and services including Reverse Osmosis Units and Demineralisation Plants. Their expertise spans process design and turnkey construction, catering to various industries such as nuclear and petrochemical.

name: ALLWATER TECHNOLOGIES LTD
description: AllWater Technologies Ltd specializes in industrial water treatment solutions, offering a comprehensive range of services including design, installation, and support for water management systems. Their expertise covers various technologies such as reverse osmosis and wastewater treatment, catering to diverse sectors like pharmaceuticals and food and beverage.

name: Purewater Technology LLC
description: Pure Water Technology specializes in providing comprehensive water and wastewater treatment solutions, including the design and construction of sewage treatment plants and advanced wastewater treatment facilities. With expertise in various treatment technologies, the company ensures high treatment efficiencies and offers a complete service from project conception to operation.
